description:
The ButtonValueSet component takes in a Value Type and a ``TargetValue``. When an IButton is pressed while this component is on the same slot, this will send the value to the provided ``TargetValue``.

}}

fields.TargetValue: The target to send the value outwards.
fields.SetValue: The value to set when the button is pressed.

usage: This is similar to the Write ProtoFlux node but as a component instead.
